title: Agentic Wiki LLM Config
description: Configuration for multi-model LLM routing. Each task can use a different provider and model. Route entries support the JSON-serializable subset of Vercel AI SDK CallSettings plus providerOptions and app-level timeoutMs.

defaults.description: Default route applied to all tasks unless overridden.

tasks.description: Per-task route overrides. Unspecified fields inherit from defaults. Keys are either built-in tasks (ingest/query/lint/merge/split/curate/fix/embedding) or skill:<id> routes that override the model for a single ingest agent-pipeline stage. Known ingest stages: skill:ingest-planner, skill:ingest-chunk-summarizer, skill:ingest-writer, skill:ingest-enricher, skill:ingest-verifier, skill:ingest-verifier-triage, skill:ingest-verifier-apply, skill:ingest-indexer. A skill:<id> entry is optional — without it the stage inherits the 'defaults' route (skill frontmatter may further override).

ingest.description: Ingest pipeline: turn raw documents into wiki pages (multi-stage agent pipeline).

query.description: Ask AI: agentic tool-loop Q&A over the wiki with citations.

lint.description: Health check: scan the wiki for findings (broken links, missing cross-refs, contradictions).

merge.description: Fuse two pages into one (invoked by page curation, not a standalone job).

split.description: Split one page into several (invoked by page curation, not a standalone job).

curate.description: Agent-driven page curation: triage then confirm merge/split candidates.

fix.description: Health fix: repair lint findings page by page.

embedding.description: Vector embeddings for semantic search. Only openai / openai-compatible / ollama providers are supported.

providers.description: Named provider profiles. Referenced by 'profile' in defaults/tasks.

headers.description: Additional HTTP headers sent with each LLM request. Only applicable for HTTP-based providers.

taskRoute.description: Route override for a specific task. All fields are optional and inherit from defaults. This intentionally contains route-level JSON settings only; runtime-only AI SDK parameters such as prompts, schemas, tools, callbacks, and AbortSignal belong in code.

profile.description: Name of a provider profile from the 'providers' section.

maxTokens.description: AI SDK CallSettings.maxTokens: maximum number of output tokens to generate.

temperature.description: AI SDK CallSettings.temperature: sampling temperature. Recommended: set either temperature or topP, not both. Provider/model ranges may differ.

topP.description: AI SDK CallSettings.topP: nucleus sampling; only tokens comprising the top P probability mass are considered. Recommended: set either temperature or topP, not both.

topK.description: AI SDK CallSettings.topK: only sample from the top K most likely tokens. Provider support varies.

presencePenalty.description: AI SDK CallSettings.presencePenalty: affects likelihood of repeating information already in the prompt. Provider support/ranges vary.

frequencyPenalty.description: AI SDK CallSettings.frequencyPenalty: affects likelihood of repeatedly using the same words or phrases. Provider support/ranges vary.

stopSequences.description: AI SDK CallSettings.stopSequences: generation stops when the model outputs one of these strings. Used by streamText; generateObject omits stopSequences in AI SDK v4.

seed.description: AI SDK CallSettings.seed: integer seed for deterministic sampling. Provider support varies.

maxRetries.description: AI SDK CallSettings.maxRetries: maximum number of retries on transient API failures. 0 disables retries. AI SDK default: 2.

providerOptions.description: AI SDK providerOptions: provider-specific JSON options passed through to the provider. Outer key = provider name (e.g. 'anthropic', 'openai', 'google').

timeoutMs.description: App-level timeout in milliseconds before aborting the request. Not an AI SDK CallSettings field. Default in this project: 480000 (8 minutes).

defaultRoute.description: Default route must specify at least profile and model.

providerOptions.description: AI SDK providerOptions. Known provider keys are documented for editor assistance; unknown provider keys remain allowed for OpenAI-compatible endpoints and future AI SDK provider options.

openaiProviderOptions.description: @ai-sdk/openai Responses API providerOptions. Chat-model construction settings such as logitBias/structuredOutputs/reasoningEffort are not route-level settings in the current provider factory.

apiKeyEnv.description: Environment variable name that contains the API key. Runtime requires this for hosted providers.

baseURL.description: Ollama server URL. Runtime default: http://localhost:11434

name.description: Human-readable name for this custom endpoint.

headers.description: Custom HTTP headers to send with requests for this provider profile.
